info.name: Smart School — FULL PROJECT (customapi)
info.description:
Complete customapi surface with expected input & output.

SETUP
1. Set {{base_url}} (e.g. http://localhost/smartschool).
2. Set {{user_id}} to a valid staff id. This is REQUIRED for many endpoints: the models resolve the acting user's role from it. Without it, role-aware queries return errors.
3. Set {{school_id}} for multi-school installs.

CONVENTIONS
- All endpoints accept POST urlencoded and respond application/json in English.
- Success: {"status": true, "success_message": "...", "data": {...}}
- Failure: {"status": false, "error_message": "..."}
- Example responses were captured against a live instance. Mutating endpoints have no captured example on purpose.
- API writes use the same models as the admin panel, so data stays in sync with the web UI.

Dear Parents, Students, and Staff,

Please note that the school will remain closed on Friday, September 4, 2026, on account of Janmashtami (the holy birth anniversary of Lord Krishna).

May Lord Krishna steal all your worries and leave you with peace, love, and immense happiness on this sacred day.

Regular academic schedules and office timings will resume as usual on Saturday, September 5, 2026.

Have a joyful and blessed Janmashtami celebration!

Warm regards,

Principal / School Administration

Dear Parents, Students, and Staff,

This is to inform everyone that the school will remain closed on Friday, August 28, 2026, in observance of the auspicious occasion of Raksha Bandhan.

May this festival strengthen the beautiful bond of love, care, and protection between siblings.

The school will resume its regular classes and administrative operations on Saturday, August 29, 2026.

Wishing you all a very Happy Raksha Bandhan!

Warm regards,

Principal / School Administration

May Lord Shiva bless you and your family with peace, prosperity, and happiness on this holy night.
